category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Mozambique) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Mozambique Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入莫桑比克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入莫桑比克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Mozambique requirements: INNOQ conformity and import inspection for regulated products, NM/IEC 62133 safety, INCM radio approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer responsibilities for Mozambique market access.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与莫桑比克要求对照：受监管产品的INNOQ合格评定与进口检验、NM/IEC 62133 安全要求、无线功能的INCM核准、UN 38.3运输，以及莫桑比克市场准入中的在地进口商责任。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與莫桑比克要求對照：受監管產品的INNOQ合格評定與進口檢驗、NM/IEC 62133 安全要求、無線功能的INCM核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及莫桑比克市場准入中的在地進口商責任。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese exporters to Mozambique should prepare INNOQ-backed conformity for regulated lithium batteries and power banks, INCM type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport documentation, and an in-country importer. Mozambique adopts IEC-based NM references for battery safety, does not run an EU-style horizontal battery regime, and Chinese GB/CCC documentation is not automatically sufficient for Mozambique market entry.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商应对受监管产品准备INNOQ支持的合格评定证明、对无线功能取得INCM型号核准、准备UN 38.3运输文件并安排在地进口商。莫桑比克采用基于IEC的NM标准作参考，不实施欧盟式横向电池制度，中国的GB/CCC文件不能自动满足莫桑比克市场准入要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商應對受監管產品準備INNOQ支持的合格評定證明、對無線功能取得INCM型號核准、準備UN 38.3運輸文件並安排在地進口商。莫桑比克採用基於IEC的NM標準作參考，不施行歐盟式橫向電池制度，中文GB/CCC文件不能自動滿足莫桑比克市場准入要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards-body, customs, and transport sources preferred.
